description:
Parent epic: V3 E9: Memory and compaction

Source task 6/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Review redaction and summary previews.

Epic closure criteria:
- memory and compaction have separate, crisp docs and tests
- compaction does not mutate the canonical transcript

comments.text: Reviewed redaction and preview behavior for memory and compaction. Hardened compaction so generated summaries are sanitized before storage, previewing, and future prompt reuse. Hardened memory so recalled prompt lines, request metadata records, stored request context, and capture metadata are sanitized before inspection/trace surfaces. Added regressions for credential-looking values in memory recall and compaction summaries. Verified with mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E9: Review redaction and summary previews
